title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip Holdings Services family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip Holdings Services:
EaseMyTrip Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip Holdings Services!
